---
title: "Talks"
---

---

<div class="talk-year">2025</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">AI for Fusion: Old Challenges, New Tools</div>
<div class="talk-venue">AI for Science Symposium, Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences — Stockholm</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KMJS0eeIcps&t=207s" class="badge-video" target="_blank">Video</a>
<a href="Slides/AI4Fusion.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Calibrated Physics-Informed Uncertainty Quantification</div>
<div class="talk-venue">Workshop on Calibrating Uncertainties, Isaac Newton Institute for Mathematical Sciences — Cambridge</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="https://www.newton.ac.uk/seminar/46887/" class="badge-video" target="_blank">Video</a>
<a href="Slides/AI4Fusion.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
<a href="Slides/ICML_Poster_Landscape.pdf" class="badge-poster" target="_blank">Poster</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2024</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">On Surrogate Modelling for Fusion</div>
<div class="talk-venue">PhysicsX — London</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/PhysicsX.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2023</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">FNO for Plasma Modelling</div>
<div class="talk-venue">IAEA Workshop on AI for Accelerating Fusion and Plasma Science — Vienna</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/IAEA_AI_Fusion_Dec2023.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">FNO for Plasma Modelling</div>
<div class="talk-venue">IAEA Fusion Energy Conference — London</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/IAEA_AI_Fusion_Dec2023.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">FNO for Plasma Modelling</div>
<div class="talk-venue">AI for Sustainability Workshop @ UCL — London</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2022</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Fourier RNNs for Modelling Noisy Physics Data</div>
<div class="talk-venue">IEEE ICMLA — Bahamas</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/F_RNNS.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2021</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Informed Sampling of the Plasma Hyperspace for Digital Twinning</div>
<div class="talk-venue">IAEA Fusion Data Processing, Validation, Analysis — Chengdu</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/IAEA_FDPVA.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Optimising Physics Informed Neural Networks</div>
<div class="talk-venue">PyTorch Ecosystem Day — Virtual</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="https://medium.com/@engineoutcompletely/pytorch-ecosystem-day-poster-9ced784da13b" class="badge-poster" target="_blank">Poster</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2020</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Fluid Surrogates using Neural PDEs</div>
<div class="talk-venue">SciML at RAL, STFC — Oxford</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/NPDE_SciML.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Solving Fluid Dynamics with Neural Networks</div>
<div class="talk-venue">FusionEP — Virtual</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXeVcMU1D9E" class="badge-video" target="_blank">Video</a>
<a href="Slides/solving_fluids_neural_nets.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-year">2019</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Data Driven Modelling of Plasma in Tokamaks</div>
<div class="talk-venue">IOP Physics in the Spotlight — London</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="Slides/IOP_forum.qmd" class="badge-slides" target="_blank">Slides</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="talk-item">
<div class="talk-title">Data Driven Modelling and Control of Plasma in Fusion Reactors</div>
<div class="talk-venue">O'Reilly AI London — London</div>
<div class="talk-links">
<a href="https://youtu.be/25GarkFQh2s" class="badge-video" target="_blank">Video</a>
</div>
</div>
